name: @wp-typia/repo
description: Bun-first WordPress block templates with Typia-powered metadata generation

scripts.lint:all: bun run lint:repo && bun run examples:lint && bun run lint:php
scripts.packages:build: bun run --filter @wp-typia/block-types build && bun run --filter @wp-typia/rest build && bun run --filter @wp-typia/api-client build && bun run --filter @wp-typia/block-runtime build && bun run --filter @wp-typia/project-tools build
scripts.examples:lint: ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false bun run --filter my-typia-block --if-present lint && ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false bun run --filter persistence-examples --if-present lint && ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false bun run --filter compound-patterns --if-present lint && ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false bun run --filter api-contract-adapter-poc --if-present lint
scripts.examples:format: bun run --filter my-typia-block --if-present format && bun run --filter persistence-examples --if-present format && bun run --filter compound-patterns --if-present format
scripts.examples:typecheck: bun run --filter my-typia-block --if-present typecheck && bun run --filter persistence-examples --if-present typecheck && bun run --filter compound-patterns --if-present typecheck && bun run --filter api-contract-adapter-poc --if-present typecheck
scripts.examples:test:e2e: bun run examples:build && bun run examples:wp-env:wait:test && playwright test
scripts.examples:test:e2e:matrix: bun run examples:build && bun run examples:wp-env:wait:test && PLAYWRIGHT_MATRIX=1 playwright test
scripts.examples:test:e2e:matrix:ci: bun run examples:wp-env:wait:test && PLAYWRIGHT_MATRIX=1 playwright test
scripts.build: bun run packages:build && bun run examples:build
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:cli
scripts.test:cli: bun run --filter @wp-typia/rest test && bun run --filter @wp-typia/api-client test && bun run --filter @wp-typia/project-tools test && bun run --filter wp-typia test && bun run --filter @wp-typia/block-runtime test
scripts.test:coverage: bun run test:coverage:packages && bun run test:coverage:project-tools
scripts.test:coverage:packages: bun run test:unit:coverage && bun run --filter @wp-typia/rest test:coverage && bun run --filter @wp-typia/api-client test:coverage && bun run --filter wp-typia test:coverage && bun run --filter @wp-typia/block-runtime test:coverage
scripts.test:cli:coverage: bun run --filter @wp-typia/rest test:coverage && bun run --filter @wp-typia/api-client test:coverage && bun run --filter @wp-typia/project-tools test:coverage && bun run --filter wp-typia test:coverage && bun run --filter @wp-typia/block-runtime test:coverage
scripts.ci:local: bun run changesets:validate && bun run runtime-coupling:validate && bun run typescript-runtime:validate && bun run publish:validate && bun run lint:all && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.publish:dry-run: bun run packages:build && DRY_RUN=1 bun run publish:oidc

author: imjlk
